---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

<!-- Please write this issue in English. See CONTRIBUTING.md for details. -->

## Description
What would you like to see added or changed?

## Use Case
Why is this useful? How would it help users?

## Proposed Approach (optional)
If you have ideas on implementation, share them here.

## Evidence / References (for new SNP panels)
If proposing a new genetic analysis module:
- [ ] SNPs are well-validated in peer-reviewed literature (provide citations)
- [ ] Evidence quality is strong (GWAS replicated, clinical guideline, or expert-panel reviewed)
- [ ] SNPs are detectable on consumer genotyping chips
- [ ] The condition is monogenic or has strong single-gene effects (NOT polygenic risk scores)
- [ ] The finding is actionable (user can discuss with physician)

## Checklist
- [ ] This feature does NOT involve polygenic risk score (PRS) calculation
- [ ] This feature maintains the project's educational/exploratory scope
- [ ] I am NOT requesting diagnostic or clinical-grade functionality
- [ ] The proposed wording avoids diagnostic language ("you have", "you are at risk", "recommended dose")
